title: A walk in the forest
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Yesterday, my family and I went for a long walk in a forest near our town. We chose that place because it is popular (27) people who enjoy nature and fresh air. At the entrance, there was a map showing several different paths through the trees. My dad suggested taking the longest path, even (28) it looked quite difficult. At first, the path was flat, but later it went up a steep hill. We stopped halfway to rest and drink some water. From the top, we could see fields, farms and a small village (29) the distance. My younger sister wanted to take photos, so we waited (30) she had finished. On the way back, we saw a deer running quickly (31) the trees. It was one of the most peaceful afternoons I have had (32) a long time.

questions.explanation: Popular with a group of people.
Until means up to the time when something finished.
Movement from one side/area to another: through the trees.
Duration expression: for a long time.
